title: Path with Maximum Gold
notes: For a single, non-branching path with degree <= 2 (generated to prevent combinatorial explosion), the optimized DFS skips starting at middle nodes, allowing O(N) execution. Empirical timings reflect roughly a 10x increase for each 10x increase in N (e.g., ~50ms to ~500ms from 10k to 100k). Space complexity is O(N) due to maximum DFS recursion depth scaling linearly with N.
